candidates.title: Kill-Switch last_heartbeat() Type-Safety Cleanup
candidates.description: Eliminated the pre-existing mypy union-attr warning in src/atlas_agent/safety/kill_switch.py by narrowing HeartbeatManager.last_heartbeat() to a local variable before .isoformat(). Preserved the last_heartbeat audit payload key and str | None value shape. Added mandatory heartbeat_expired audit-payload regression tests covering ISO-string and None branches.
notes: Accepted into the v0.6.19 candidate chain on 2026-07-01.
Planning-only; no v0.6.19 tag, GitHub Release, or PyPI publication exists.
Does not enable live trading, live submit, order placement, broker/provider execution, credential loading, network access, or approval queue mutation.
Does not change kill-switch decision logic, fail-closed behavior, heartbeat/deadman behavior, RiskManager, or audit hash-chain.
